title: Workday Prism Analytics Table Schema
description: JSON Schema describing the structure of a Prism Analytics table schema definition used when creating tables via the Prism Analytics API. Field definitions specify the columns, data types, and constraints for external data loaded into Workday Prism Analytics.

fields.description: Ordered collection of field (column) definitions that make up the table schema

Field.description: A single field (column) in a Prism Analytics table schema

name.description: Field name used in data files and queries

displayName.description: Display name shown in the Prism Analytics UI

description.description: Description of the field purpose and contents

ordinal.description: 1-based position index of the field within the table schema

required.description: Whether the field is required for data loading

externalId.description: Whether this field serves as a unique identifier for upsert and delete operations

defaultValue.description: Default value applied when the field is missing from input data

precision.description: Total number of significant digits for Numeric fields

scale.description: Number of decimal places for Numeric fields

parseFormat.description: Date or DateTime parse format pattern (e.g., yyyy-MM-DD)

FieldType.description: Data type specification for a Prism table field

descriptor.description: Human-readable display name for the field type

fields.name: employ_yrs
fields.description: Integer number of years in role.
